test.name: load_url_parameter
dashql_viz_position
test.input: VIZ weather_avg USING LINE ( position = ( row = 0, column = 0, width = 4, height = 15 ) )

test.name: dashql_viz_position_short
dashql_input_calendar_date
test.input: INPUT foo TYPE DATETIME USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo) USING TABLE;

test.name: dashql_input_calendar_date_range
test.input: INPUT foo TYPE DATETIME[2] USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo[0], foo[1]) USING TABLE;
